data.body:
PASS 1 (E4 — assumption/premise verification) review. Verified plan assertions against the codebase:

VERIFIED (affirmations):
- `_io/import_ndjson.py` 7 `# noqa: BLE001` sites confirmed at lines 225,237,243,258,271,276,289 — exact match, all per-iteration fail-open with `warn(...)`.
- Stderr prints confirmed in `_store/push.py` (lines 129,144,167,184,192,195) and `_store/sync.py` (80,130,147) and `reducer/_processors.py` (144,578, both `file=sys.stderr`).
- `_json_or` broad swallow exists in `__init__.py` (`except Exception: return default`).
- Allowlist confirmed at `pyproject.toml` `[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]` (lines 207-212).

FINDINGS (see checklist items below):
1. The `_json_or` swallow is asserted at `__init__.py:228`, but line 228 is a comment; the actual `try/except Exception/return default` is at lines 233-236.
2. Allowlist scope mismatch: `__init__.py` is exempt from `["BLE001"]` ONLY (not T201) and `reducer/*` from `["T201"]` ONLY (not BLE001). The plan's blanket "Remove these packages from the BLE001/T201 allowlist" over-states the per-package rule set.

- [ ] Correct the `_json_or` line citation: the swallow is at `src/rebar/__init__.py:233-236` (`try/except Exception/return default`), not line 228 (a comment). Update the plan body and AC.
- [ ] Reconcile the allowlist-removal claim with the actual per-file rule sets (`pyproject.toml:208-212`): `__init__.py` carries BLE001 only; `reducer/*` carries T201 only; `_io/*` carries T201 only; only `graph/*` and `_store/*` carry both. The plan's "remove from BLE001/T201 allowlist" should name the exact rule(s) per package.
